title: Youtube Poop: Haruhi Blows Up
description:
...Scotland.  Haruhi Blows Up Scotland.

Tonight's the anniversary of something that happened a year ago.  What is it?  I'm not saying.  But there's a hint in this Poop that can help you figure it out.  A BIG hint.  A REALLY big hint.  A hint so big that if you can't find it, you shall be disavowed and I'll laugh at your ass.


((Edit: Not surprisingly, none of you figured it out.  T'was the anniversary of the first night I watched Haruhi (yeah, I kept track).))
